title: usecase.Render orchestrates via domain.Renderer port (no direct file writes)
acceptance_criteria: domain.Renderer port: Render(ctx, RenderInput{Items, Events, Theme, OutDir}) (RenderOutput{Files, Stats}, error). All file writes (index.html, tree.html, summary.html, assets/styles.css, assets/app.js per §17.2) live in adapter/render — usecase.Render never touches the filesystem.
usecase.Render only orchestrates: load items via Store, load events via EventLog, validate theme, call Renderer.Render, return its output.
Reads items + events only; never mutates.
Returns { out_dir, files, manifest, stats } per §15.2.
Tests for usecase.Render use a fake Renderer; tests for adapter/render use a t.TempDir() output and assert files appear with expected names + non-empty bodies.
